commands.repair_reason: No ClawSweeper repair is needed; this active implementation PR has sufficient proof and needs maintainer review plus exact-head CI handling.; Cleared: The diff changes local rollback filesystem handling plus tests/changelog and adds no dependencies, workflows, secret access, lifecycle hooks, or broader package-execution authority. commands.review_summary:
The PR snapshots and restores managed npm `package.json`, `package-lock.json`, and `node_modules` around rejected plugin installs/updates, with regression coverage and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main lets npm mutate the managed root before later validation and rolls back without a full package/lock/node_modules snapshot; the PR also includes live after-fix output for the blocked update flow.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair is needed; this active implementation PR has sufficient proof and needs maintainer review plus exact-head CI handling.
